query: SELECT id, name, neighborhood FROM establishments WHERE (name LIKE '%(Delivery)%' OR name LIKE '%→ Delivery%' OR name LIKE '%| Delivery%' OR name LIKE '%- Delivery%' OR name LIKE '%(Delivery e Retirada)%' OR name LIKE '%Delivery -  %' OR name REGEXP 'Delivery$') AND name NOT LIKE '%Almoço%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Chopp%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Drinks%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Feijoada%' ORDER BY name LIMIT 50 OFFSET 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT id, name, neighborhood FROM establishments WHERE (name LIKE '%(Delivery)%' OR name LIKE '%→ Delivery%' OR name LIKE '%| Delivery%' OR name LIKE '%- Delivery%' OR name LIKE '%(Delivery e Retirada)%' OR name LIKE '%Delivery -  %' OR name REGEXP 'Delivery$') AND name NOT LIKE '%Almoço%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Chopp%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Drinks%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Feijoada%' ORDER BY name LIMIT 50 OFFSET 20;
